demographics.living_situation: lives independently at a private residence, manages on their own

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The patches on my elbows have cracked wide open. They are bleeding, extremely sore, and the skin around them is red and hot. I think they are infected.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The thick patches split open tonight when I bent my arms, they're bleeding and sore, and the redness around them has me worried it's turning into an infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: tonight — the thick scaly patches on both elbows split open when I bent my arms
symptom_narrative.character: deep linear splits in the thick patches that sting sharply and bleed a little when I bend the elbow
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very sore, a sharp pain when I move my elbows
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both elbows, over the thick patches on the pointy/back part of the elbow
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when I bend the elbow; the splits opened after bending
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: bending my elbows — I also rubbed the area a lot earlier which seemed to make it redder
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin around the cracks looks red and feels warm to me and I'm scared it's getting infected; I haven't seen any pus and I don't have a fever or chills
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had these scaly patches on my elbows and knees for years — they get dry and flaky, especially in cold weather
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: hard to bend my arms without it hurting, but I'm otherwise coping fine at home

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing scaly patches on my elbows and knees — I was told years ago it's plaque psoriasis
past_medical_history.how_managed: I was prescribed a cream for it but I haven't used it for weeks

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a prescription ointment for my skin patches (I think it's a steroid combined with a vitamin D cream)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives and manages independently; stopped using the skin creams over recent weeks; home has been very dry with the cold weather

objective_data_offered.value: thick silvery-white scaly patches on both elbows with deep linear cracks that are bleeding a little
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera; lighting and focus limit what can be judged, and depth/texture cannot be assessed on video

objective_data_offered.value: a rim of redness right around the cracked patches, which looks to me like it lightens when I press on it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessed; blanching and the true extent of redness cannot be reliably judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel feverish and I've had no shakes or chills
no yellow or green pus and nothing weeping from the cracks that I can see
the redness is a thin band right around the patches and doesn't seem to be tracking up my arm
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported extent; the patient cannot reliably detect early spread or deep tissue involvement
